message:
docs: add callback stdlib gap row to support surface contract and sync beads tracker

- docs/support_surface_contract.json: add runtime.callback_stdlib_
  collection_callbacks row documenting fail-closed callback/heap-access
  builtins; add stdlib.rs and callback_stdlib_dispatch.rs to evidence
  sources; bump row count to 13
- docs/RGC_SUPPORT_SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1.md: document the new callback
  stdlib gap and its fail-closed posture
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ The contract exists so the public story is derived from the same evidence that
 already governs:
 
 - shipped `frankenctl` help and README surfaces
+- callback-heavy stdlib collection/runtime gaps on the shipped execution path
 - React capability rows and fail-closed diagnostics
 - TypeScript normalization subset limits
 - module-resolution fallback semantics
@@ -49,6 +50,7 @@ Current notable rows:
 
 - `runtime.frankenctl_core_workflows`: shipped
 - `runtime.doctor_support_bundle_export`: shipped, but lossless-mode bound
+- `runtime.callback_stdlib_collection_callbacks`: unsupported and fail-closed
 - `runtime.react_compile_contract`: deferred and fail-closed
 - `runtime.react_execution_entrypoints`: unsupported and fail-closed
 - `typescript.normalization_subset`: shipped only for the documented subset

@@ -13,7 +13,9 @@
     "docs/rgc_module_resolution_index_v1.json",
     "docs/rgc_cross_platform_matrix_v1.json",
     "docs/rgc_observability_channel_policy_v1.json",
-    "crates/franken-engine/src/bin/frankenctl.rs"
+    "crates/franken-engine/src/bin/frankenctl.rs",
+    "crates/franken-engine/src/stdlib.rs",
+    "crates/franken-engine/src/callback_stdlib_dispatch.rs"
   ],
   "allowed_support_statuses": [
     "shipped",
@@ -178,6 +180,37 @@
         "target_milestone": null
       }
     },
+    {
+      "surface_id": "runtime.callback_stdlib_collection_callbacks",
+      "area": "runtime",
+      "entry_surface": "Array/Map/Set callback-heavy prototype methods on the shipped runtime path",
+      "support_status": "unsupported",
+      "claim_language_state": "target_only",
+      "current_behavior": "Callback-heavy collection methods are installed publicly in stdlib surface setup, but the shipped runtime path still fail-closes them at builtin dispatch time with the generic `requires callback or heap access (use interpreter dispatch)` error instead of executing user callbacks through the runtime.",
+      "evidence_sources": [
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/stdlib.rs",
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/callback_stdlib_dispatch.rs"
+      ],
+      "linked_fallback_reasons": [
+        "requires_callback_or_heap_access_use_interpreter_dispatch"
+      ],
+      "mode_matrix_row_id": null,
+      "user_visible_diagnostic": {
+        "error_code": null,
+        "diagnostic_surface": "runtime stdlib builtin dispatch",
+        "message_template": "Array/Map/Set callback-heavy prototype methods are not yet shipped on the executable runtime path and currently fail closed with `requires callback or heap access (use interpreter dispatch)`.",
+        "remediation": "Treat callback-heavy Array/Map/Set methods as unsupported on the shipped runtime path; narrow the workload to currently supported non-callback builtins or wait for the callback-dispatch runtime lane to ship before claiming support.",
+        "remediation_bead": "bd-1lsy.10.11.2"
+      },
+      "fallback_policy": {
+        "fallback_mode": "fail_closed_type_error",
+        "waiver_required": true,
+        "max_waiver_age_hours": 168,
+        "user_visible_diagnostics_required": true,
+        "remediation_bead": "bd-1lsy.10.11.2",
+        "target_milestone": null
+      }
+    },
     {
       "surface_id": "runtime.react_compile_contract",
       "area": "runtime",
